chunks.text: IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH CIRCUIT COURT, LARKANA Present: Irshad Ali Shah, J. Agha Faisal, J. CP D1265of 2010: Rais Chutto & anotherVs. E.D.O (Education), Kashmore &others For the Petitioners: Mr. Ghulam Dastagir A. Shahani, advocate Date of hearing: 03.03.2022 Date of announcement: 03.03.2022 ORDER Agha Faisal, J. The petitionerhas sought release of salaries and compensation for financial and mental loss. The comments filed by the respondents demonstrate that the petitioners were never appointed and that the documentation relied upon is entirely fake and fabricated. It is further contended that the petitioners have never performed any duty for a single day, hence the question of salaries does not even arise. It is settled law that no vested rights could be created by reliance upon forged documents and even if the petitioner opts to contest the factum relied upon by the respondents, the writ jurisdiction of this Court is not amenable in such regard. In view hereof, it is observed that no vested right has been demonstrated to merit the exercise of writ jurisdiction and even otherwise this petition is found to be misconceived, hence, dismissed. JUDGE JUDGE Only the petitioner no 2 since the petition with respect to the petitioner no. 1 stood dismissed vide order dated 24.02.2015.
